name: Crab Dip#2
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the mayonnaise or salad dressing, garlic salt, onion, mustard, powdered sugar, and white wine until well combined.
2. Gradually add the crabmeat to the mixture and stir gently until all ingredients are evenly incorporated.
3. Serve the dip warm with crackers.
